apply: Students will be able to classify a given business scenario into one of the forms of business organisation
Students will be able to advise on the suitability of a business organisation form for a given business scenario
Students will be able to suggest modifications to an existing business organisation form to suit business needs
analyze: Students will be able to compare and contrast different forms of business organisation
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of business organisation form on business performance
Students will be able to identify the strengths and weaknesses of different forms of business organisation
remember: Students will be able to list and describe different forms of business organisations
Students will be able to recall the characteristics of sole proprietorship, partnership, and company
Students will be able to explain the advantages and limitations of each form of business organisation
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of business organisation and its importance
Students will be able to describe the evolution of business organisation forms
Students will be able to identify the factors influencing the choice of business organisation form

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of business organisation and its importance
Describe the evolution of business organisation forms
List and describe different forms of business organisations
Explain the characteristics of sole proprietorship, partnership, and company
Identify the factors influencing the choice of business organisation form
board_exam_objectives: Explain the characteristics of sole proprietorship, partnership, and company
Describe the advantages and limitations of each form of business organisation
Compare and contrast different forms of business organisation
Evaluate the impact of business organisation form on business performance
